title: neoboutonia africana var. glabrescens
intro: Neoboutonia africana var. glabrescens, also known as African boutonnia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its glabrous leaves and stems. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Neoboutonia africana var. glabrescens is often used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its therapeutic properties.
